blended.narrative: Jay Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
